calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (120 Day Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $1,427,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 3, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $300,000.00 is required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property (144 Day Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Advanced From Jul-25-12 To Jul-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property (144 Day Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Line 53 PTR-12-295748 (sale): Ernest Der appeared on behalf of Debra Dolch. The Court discussed the bond issue. Mr. Der said that the living trustor wanted to waive bond. Because there was nothing in the file supporting that, the Court gave Mr. Der the choice of continuing the matter to support waiving bond or proceeding with bond being required. He chose to proceed. Jay Lampus appeared to overbid on behalf of his clients Matt Boyles (and one other). Andrew Halpern appeared on behalf of the original bidders. The property sold for $1,216,000 to Mr. Lampus' clients. The required bond is $1,121,000. Mr. Der will prepare a revised order.

Notes taken by Judge Peter Busch.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time And Advancement Of Hearing Date For Report Of Sale And Petition To Confirm Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
